name: Fen Caldra
excerpt: Fen Caldra is a careful and discreet private transport operator.
notes: Fen Caldra, in his mid-40s, was born in Tiveck and has spent his life near the waterfront. He operates a private transport service with two vessels and a trusted crew. Known for reliability and discretion, he runs cargo through the Salt Warren, a network of tidal caves beneath Tiveck. He discovered the Sunken Ledger six years ago and keeps it hidden. Fen has leverage over Orris Vane through the Warden's Seal and finds Maren Ashveil intriguing, suspecting she seeks the Ledger.
